channel.title: University of OXFORD on EICP-LAB
channel.description: Recent content in University of OXFORD on EICP-LAB

item.title: Research featured in Oxford news
item.description: Research by Prof. Yangsiyu Lu was featured in Oxford INET News, highlighting her study on China’s environmental regulation and industrial firm productivity. The research shows that environmental regulation can act as a growth catalyst by encouraging firm upgrading, innovation, and more efficient resource allocation.
